=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (11:39-11:48) TS377035: This layer provides A which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
  Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable layerMergeAllWithDependencies for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Move layer to Layer.provideMerge" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics layerMergeAllWithDependencies:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class A extends Context.Service<A>()("A", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class B extends Context.Service<B>()("B", { make: Effect.as(A, {}) }) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export const preview = Layer.mergeAll( B.Default).pipe(Layer.provideMerge(A.Default))
